summary: Iteration 13 frontend-only validation of (a) PINK/WHT/SWP test-signal type selector in TopBar, (b) analog-style Pan visualization in ChannelStrip, (c) Meters pop-out window via #popout=meters hash. 9/9 test groups passed.

issues: Chrome console warns 'slider-vertical appearance keyword is non-standard and will be removed'. Pre-existing, cosmetic only.
Recharts width(-1)/height(-1) warning still fires twice when EQ modal opens. Pre-existing from iteration 12, no visual impact.

critical_code_review_comments: TopBar pn-type-{pink,white,sweep} buttons correctly call setAllPinkNoise(pinkAllOn || undefined, pinkLevel, t.id). Verified: type persists across reload via DspProvider localStorage hydration, propagates to all 32 outputs simultaneously, and per-channel ChannelStrip pink-noise button labels update live (▮▮ WHITE -20 / ▮▮ PINK -20 / ▮▮ SWEEP -20).

Pan visualization in ChannelStrip.jsx uses equal-power math (cos/sin of angle = pNorm * π/2) matching the audio engine's panner — visually accurate. Double-click on pan-visual resets pan to 0 ('C'); slider value changes update both the bar gradient and the cursor position. Verified L25/R50/C transitions.

App.js correctly renders only MetersView (with custom header) when window.location.hash === '#popout=meters' and skips the TopBar entirely. Verified 128 meter testid elements present, no [data-testid=master-gain] / [data-testid=tab-channels]. No audio context started in popout window — only mirrors state via storage events. No JS/console errors during popout init.

MetersView meters-popout button uses window.open(url, 'dsp-meters-popout', ...) with proper #popout=meters URL — intercepted call payload confirmed: {url: '...#popout=meters', name: 'dsp-meters-popout', feats: 'width=1100,height=720,...'}.

MINOR (informational, not blocking): App.js's `isPopout` is computed only at module evaluation. A SPA hash change in the same tab (page.goto with same path but new hash) does NOT re-render into popout mode. Real usage works because window.open creates a new browsing context with a full load. If main agent wants in-tab hash-toggle support, add a hashchange listener that forces a re-render — but current spec is fully satisfied.
All regression flows still green: tab-channels/meters/matrix switching, open-eq, open-comp, open-presets, open-print modals all open without errors.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 13 prior iterations remain intact. New features (pn-type selector, pan-visual, popout via #popout=meters) all verified working. NOTE for future tests: to test #popout=meters via Playwright, you must do a fresh page navigation (use a different query string like ?fresh=1#popout=meters) — calling page.goto() with only a hash change won't re-mount App.js. Real users hit it through window.open which triggers a full load. The popout window correctly mirrors state via localStorage 'storage' events and meter levels via BroadcastChannel (verified no AudioContext created in popout, meters all show -∞).
